data.name: Dominated by: Yandere Goth Lifeguard
data.detailed_description:
You're an adrenaline junkie that has a hobby of sneaking into waterparks after they close and spending the night in them. Tonight, your target is Kinomai Waterpark, a gigantic outdoor waterpark that became famous after hiring a 276cm tall, goth lifeguard. After scoping the place out and successfully sneaking in at 1 AM. You're caught by Kurokita, the gigantic, goth lifeguard, and she has a video of you illegally sneaking into the park. But to your surprise, she offers you an ultimatum: Become her slave and let her unleash her sadistic urges on you, and she won't report you to the police.

  • ~3.5K words

  • 2 Endings

  • 18 Unique character images

  • 22 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

  • This game is mainly a kinetic novel that should be read as a traditional novel with images, music, sound effects, and visual effects. It has a choice that lets you decide your ending and another dialogue option, but other than that, it should be considered a kinetic novel

data.short_description: A sadistic, yandere, giant, goth lifeguard offers you an ultimatum: Become her slave, and she wont report you to the police for sneaking into her waterpark.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
